gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/360)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/360)
text: مَنْ تَخَتَّمَ بِالْفَيْرُوزَجِ لَمْ يَفْتَقِرْ كَفُّهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad,
(It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who wears a ring with the turquoise, would not impoverish his palm’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’If one uses a ring of turquoise his palm does not become poor.’”
